questions.question: Which actor plays Iron Man in the Marvel movies?
questions.explanation: Robert Downey Jr. played Tony Stark in all of the Marvel Iron Man films.

questions.question: What is the name of the Pixar cartoon about a fish looking for its son?
questions.explanation: Finding Nemo (2003) tells the story of Marlin the clownfish in search of his son Nemo.

questions.question: In which series do children fight creatures from the Upside Down?
questions.explanation: Stranger Things takes place in Hawkins, where children encounter creatures from the Upside Down world.

questions.question: Who directed the movie Inception?
questions.explanation: Christopher Nolan directed Inception (2010) starring Leonardo DiCaprio.

questions.question: Which movie won the best picture Oscar in 2024?
options: Killers according to the ring moon
questions.explanation: Oppenheimer Wins Best Picture Oscar 2024 at the ceremony.

questions.question: What is the name of the AI ​​robot in Big Hero 6?
questions.explanation: Baymax is an inflatable healthcare robot from the Disney film The Big Six.

questions.question: Who said the famous line "I am your father" in Star Wars?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader uttered this phrase to Luke Skywalker in The Empire Strikes Back.

questions.question: Which Disney movie tells the story of two sisters, Elsa and Anna?
questions.explanation: "Frozen" (Frozen, 2013) tells the story of sisters Elsa and Anna from the kingdom of Arendelle.

questions.question: Which director made The Freaky Eight and Pulp Fiction?
questions.explanation: Quentin Tarantino directed both of these films and is known for his unique style.

questions.question: What is the name of the show about the seven kingdoms fighting for the Iron Throne?
options: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
questions.explanation: Game of Thrones is an HBO series based on George R.R. Martin's books.

questions.question: Which actor plays Batman in The Batman (2022)?
questions.explanation: Robert Pattinson played Batman in the 2022 film directed by Matt Reeves. in the movie.

questions.question: What animal is Simba in The Lion King cartoon?
questions.explanation: Simba is a lion who becomes the king of the Lands of the Rise in Disney's The Lion King.

questions.question: Which Netflix series is about chess genius Beth Harmon?
questions.explanation: "The Queen's Gambit" (The Queen's Gambit) is a Netflix miniseries about chess genius Beth Harmon.

questions.question: Which Steven Spielberg movie is about Dinosaur Park?
questions.explanation: "Jurassic Park" (Jurassic Park, 1993), Spielberg's film about revived dinosaurs.

questions.question: Which cartoon tells about the emotions - Joy, Sadness, Anger - that live in a girl's head?
questions.explanation: The Pixar film "Inside Out" (2015) depicts the emotions that live in the head of a girl named Riley.
